creator: OrdosAlpha
description: Sonic the Hedgehog Remix started in 2001 as a simple palette hack of Sonic the Hedgehog by OrdosAlpha. This project has gone through a complete reconstruction and is now a hack of Sonic the Hedgehog 2, featuring brand new stages and modes of gameplay.

Genesis
ROM Hack
title: Sonic the Hedgehog Remix
